title: Smoked Haddock Fritters
description: A simple Portuguese-inspired recipe for crispy grilled fritters made with smoked haddock. Serve with a side of lemon wedges and tartar sauce for a delicious snack.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, bread crumbs, egg, onion, parsley, salt, and black pepper.
3. Flake the smoked haddock into small pieces and add it to the bowl. Mix well.
4. Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
5. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the fritters for 3-4 minutes per side, until golden brown and crispy.
7. Serve hot with lemon wedges and tartar sauce.
